user.title: Set up AllEars
user.description: This will register a webhook to receive data from the AllEars Android app.

webhook_url.title: Copy your webhook URL
webhook_url.description:
Paste this URL into the AllEars Android app under
Settings → Home Assistant Webhook URL:

`{webhook_url}`

Tap Submit when done.

simulate_webhook.name: Simulate Webhook
simulate_webhook.description: Simulates a webhook payload from the AllEars app.

webhook_id.name: Webhook ID
webhook_id.description: The webhook ID of the device to simulate.

flow_name.name: Flow Name
flow_name.description: The name of the detected sound flow.
